title: fix: align elevenlabs pricing with scale plan
author: ElliotEtag

gist.headline: Cheaper buzzes and beeps
gist.blurb: We've updated our ElevenLabs integration to make text-to-speech generation even more affordable for the hive. Enjoy cheaper high-quality voice generation!
gist.summary: Aligned ElevenLabs model pricing with the Scale plan, reducing the cost of text-to-speech generation and updating access tiers for Scribe.
gist.impact: Users will enjoy cheaper rates for ElevenLabs TTS models, while Scribe has been moved to the paid tier for sustainable usage.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee adjusting price tags on a retro boombox or audio equipment. Nomnom creature happily eating the old expensive price tags.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly the bee mascot adjusting a lime green (#ecf874) price tag on a retro boombox. The round tan Nomnom creature happily eats the old price tags nearby. Soft pastel gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic, Stardew Valley vibes. Emotionally warm, nostalgic but beautiful.
